description_long: This is a white wooden bed frame with a classic panel design, featuring both a prominent headboard and a matching footboard. The frame is constructed with thick, rectangular panels and decorative molding, giving it a traditional and sturdy appearance. The bed slats are exposed, made of lighter wood, and run horizontally to support a mattress. On both sides of the bed, there are two integrated drawers, providing additional storage space beneath the sleeping area. The overall finish is smooth and matte, with subtle detailing on the feet and drawer fronts. No mattress or bedding is present, leaving the frame and storage features fully visible.
description: A white wooden bed frame with panel headboard, footboard, and built-in storage drawers, featuring exposed slats and a classic, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall headboard, footboard, and the full width of the slatted base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the frame, the side storage drawers, and the thickness of the panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the footboard and the open space beneath the slats, with no drawers visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other set of storage drawers and the panel construction.
